content.content:
Feature: Factorial Calculation
  As a user of the MathUtils library
  I want to calculate factorial values correctly
  So that I can perform mathematical operations accurately

  Scenario: Calculate factorial of 0
    Given I have a MathUtils calculator
    When I calculate the factorial of 0
    Then the result should be 1

  Scenario: Calculate factorial of positive numbers
    Given I have a MathUtils calculator
    When I calculate the factorial of 5
    Then the result should be 120

  Scenario: Calculate factorial of negative numbers
    Given I have a MathUtils calculator
    When I calculate the factorial of -1
    Then an IllegalArgumentException should be thrown

  Scenario: Calculate factorial of large numbers (should cause ArithmeticException in fixed version, ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException in buggy version)
    Given I have a MathUtils calculator
    When I calculate the factorial of 21
    Then an ArithmeticException should be thrown
